id: see the real URL in it
intention: 在文档里看到真实链接
naturalChunk: see the real URL in it
avoidSaying: see the thuthy URL right here
sentencePatterns: You can see the real URL in it.
You can see the real URL right in the document.
realLifeExamples: This is the original Markdown document, and you can see the real URL in it.
Open the source file and you can see the real URL right in the document.
usageNotes: real URL 很自然；truthy 是编程语境词，不用来表示“真实的链接”。
productionPrompts: 用 You can see the real URL in it. 造一句和网页、文档或源码有关的英文句子。
